aiModelsLoadError: Could not load this tier’s AI models.
ceilingsDescription: The defaults every tenant at this tier is held to. Leave a field blank for the platform default — which is a real limit, never unlimited. An individual tenant can still be given an override, which is recorded as an exception to this tier.
colorDescription: A pill shown beside a tenant on this tier. Presentation only — it says nothing about what the tier grants.
description: The packaging a tenant is sold. Drag to arrange how tiers are listed — order is presentation only.
descriptionFieldHint: What this tier is sold as. Operator-facing only.
descriptionPlaceholder: Premium packaging: the highest ceilings and the broadest set of AI models.
newTierDescription: A new packaging option. It takes effect once tenants are created at it or moved to it — defining one changes nothing on its own.
noProvidersRegistered: No AI providers registered yet. Register one on the AI providers screen before packaging it onto a tier.
settingsUnavailable: Settings unavailable ({{error}}). This tier’s existing ceilings are left unchanged; name and description can still be saved.
tierInUseNotice_one: {{count}} tenant is packaged at this tier. Saving a change here re-prices it within a minute — no restart, and no effect on any tenant given its own override. The tier cannot be deleted until it is moved elsewhere.
tierInUseNotice_other: {{count}} tenants are packaged at this tier. Saving a change here re-prices them within a minute — no restart, and no effect on any tenant given its own override. The tier cannot be deleted until they are moved elsewhere.
title: Tiers
tokenDescription: The tier id used across the platform; it cannot change.
truncatedProvidersNotice: Showing the first {{count}} of {{total}} providers. This tier may grant a provider that is not listed here.
